chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No. 140 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Fresh Case. 1) For order on CMA No. 2411/21 (Exemption) 2) For hearing of main case. -------------- 22.08.2025. Mr. Shams Mohiuddin Advocate holding brief for Mr. Rana Sakhawat ali, Advocate for Applicant. ____________ Matter has been called twice and on both occasions, brief has been held on behalf of Mr. Rana Sakhawat Ali, Advocate; whereas, matter is pending since 2021 and no effort has been made to get the notices issued. On perusal of the record otherwise reflects that no substantial question of law arises out of the order in question inasmuch even the Collector (Appeals) has decided the matter in favour of the Respondent. Be that as it may, this Reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution with pending application(s). CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Ayaz
